text:
SHORT NAME: SUPLR_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: SUPLR_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
331L00000X: Blood bank 
332000000X: Military/U.S. Coast Guard pharmacy 
332100000X: Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) pharmacy 
332800000X: Indian Health Service/Tribal/Urban Indian Health (I/T/U)
